title: Password Reset
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security > Password. After selecting Reset Password, the system sends a verification code to the user's registered email address. The code expires after 10 minutes. If the user does not receive the email, they should check spam or request a new code after 60 seconds.

title: Account Deletion
content: Users can delete their account from Account Settings > Privacy > Delete Account. Account deletion is permanent after a 14-day grace period. During the grace period, signing back in cancels the deletion request. After deletion, profile data and saved preferences cannot be restored.

title: Billing and Invoices
content: Billing information is available from Settings > Billing. Users can download invoices as PDF files, update payment methods, and view upcoming renewal dates. Failed payments are retried automatically for seven days before the subscription is paused.

title: Team Member Invitations
content: Workspace admins can invite team members from Workspace Settings > Members. Invitations are sent by email and expire after 72 hours. Admins can resend or revoke pending invitations. New members receive the default Member role unless an admin chooses a different role during invitation.

title: Data Export
content: Users can export their data from Settings > Privacy > Export Data. Exports include profile details, account activity, and uploaded documents. Export preparation may take up to 24 hours. When the export is ready, the user receives a secure download link by email.

title: Support Response Times
content: Standard support requests receive a first response within two business days. Priority support requests receive a first response within four business hours. Support hours are Monday through Friday, 9 AM to 6 PM local support-region time, excluding public holidays.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Two-factor authentication can be enabled from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Authentication. Users may choose an authenticator app or email codes. Backup codes are shown once during setup and should be stored safely. Admins can require two-factor authentication for all workspace members.
